name: Kehua Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Kehua Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of automobile turbocharger components, hydraulic pumps/valves, and machinery fittings in China. The company also offers construction machinery parts. It also provides its products to customers in North America, South America, Europe, Japan, South Korea, etc. The company was formerly known as Liyang Kehua Machinery Manufacture Co., Ltd. Kehua Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Jiangsu, China.
